message:
fix: columnar concat/slice/merge now propagate null bitmaps

Previously, concatColumnarBatches, sliceColumnarBatch, and
columnarKWayMerge silently dropped null bitmaps from input columns.
Currently safe because WASM results set hasNulls=false, but this
would corrupt data when null support is added to the WASM engine.

- concatColumnarBatches: merges null bitmaps from all input batches
- sliceColumnarBatch: re-packs null bitmap bits for the offset range
- columnarKWayMerge: copies null bitmap bits during merge loop
- 6 new tests covering null bitmap propagation through all paths
